summary: Git submodule configuration file locking failed during early CI setup (.git/modules/library/backtrace/config), followed by 1143 test errors (mostly UI tests) occurring minutes later. The early git configuration errors likely prevented proper submodule initialization, cascading to widespread test failures.
root_cause: Could not lock .git/modules/library/backtrace/config file and could not unset core.worktree setting in submodule 'src/doc'. These git submodule configuration failures occurred at 19:22:38, before the bulk of test failures at 20:16+, indicating incomplete or corrupted submodule initialization.

evidence.quote: [×12] 2026-05-06T19:22:38.8889193Z error: could not lock config file .git/modules/library/backtrace/con...
evidence.reason: Critical error repeated 12 times early in the run, indicating a persistent git submodule configuration file-locking issue

evidence.quote: [×11] 2026-05-06T19:22:38.8907169Z warning: Could not unset core.worktree setting in submodule 'src/doc...
evidence.reason: Warning repeated 11 times at the same timestamp, showing git configuration problems across multiple submodules
Majority of test failures begin ~54 minutes after the git config errors, suggesting the early git issues cascaded to test failures

suggested_fix: Verify git submodule permissions and checkout state in CI. Check for dubious git ownership issues by running 'git config --global --add safe.directory' for affected paths, or review git checkout/submodule initialization configuration in the workflow.
